ptxt.intxrefpoff: Oil Pump Assembly Disassembly and Reassembly

s1.ptxt: Check body clearance of driven gear (1).
Push driven gear to one side of oil pump body (2). Using feeler gauge, measure clearance between driven gear and body.
If clearance exceeds its standard value, replace oil pump assembly.

spec.title: Body clearance between oil pump driven gear and oil pump body

s1.ptxt: Check tip clearance of drive gear (2) and driven gear (1).
Using feeler gauge, measure clearance between drive and driven gear tips.
If clearance exceeds its standard value, replace oil pump assembly.

spec.title: Tip clearance between oil pump drive gear and oil pump driven gear

s1.ptxt: Check side clearance of both gears.
Using straightedge (1) and feeler gauge (2), measure clearance between gears and pump body.
If clearance exceeds its standard value, replace oil pump assembly.

spec.title: Side clearance between gears and oil pump body

s1.ptxt: Using special tool, measure bore of stator shaft bushing (1).
If check result is not as specification, replace oil pump assembly.
Install direct clutch assembly (1) to stator shaft assembly (2), then ensure that direct clutch assembly turns smoothly.

If unsmooth rotation or noise are found in oil pump assembly, replace oil pump assembly with new one. This check should also be done to input shaft assembly and replace input shaft assembly if necessary.
Using special tool, measure bore of oil pump body bushing (1).
If check result is not as specification, replace oil pump assembly. Torque converter also needs to be checked. Replace torque converter, if necessary.
